zh.lifeSummary: Sawe O'Niel於大約1330年出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭。她於1370年之前與Lord John Bisset在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年在英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆格林享年58歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭。

nameMeanings.name: O'Niel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Neill
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Sawe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: apparently from the name of the herb (Middle English sauge, via Old French from Latin salvia); compare Sorrel and Bay . In part it may also have been taken from the vocabulary word meaning ‘wise’ (from Latin sapius).

en.lifeSummary: Sawe O'Niel was born about 1330, in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Lord John Bisset before 1370, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1387, in Glynn, County Antrim, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sawe O'Niel est née environ 1330, à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Lord John Bisset avant 1370, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Glynn, County Antrim, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Morì nel 1387, nel Glynn, County Antrim, Irlanda del Nord, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Ireland, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sawe O'Nielは約1330年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドで生まれた。1370年以前にアイルランドでLord John Bissetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年にイギリス北アイルランドコウントイ アントリムグリンで58歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sawe O'Niel(은)는 대략 1330년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1370년 이전 아일랜드에서 Lord John Bisset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 그린에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sawe O'Niel родилась около 1330 г. в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John Bisset перед 1370 г. в местности Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности глинн, коунти антрим, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания.
